root.docs_md: Shared component types and reflection registration used across all vmux crates.

items.name: CorePlugin
items.docs_md: Registers reflection for the shared component types so they can be saved and loaded.

items.name: focus_pane_entity
items.signature: pub fn focus_pane_entity(entity: Entity, commands: &mut Commands<'_, '_>, child_of_q: &Query<'_, '_, &ChildOf>)

items.name: TermSelectionRange
items.docs_md: Range of selected cells in viewport coordinates (0-based row/col).

members.name: col
members.docs_md: Starting column index of this span in the row (0-based).

members.name: grid_cols
members.docs_md:
Number of grid columns this span covers (accounts for wide characters
taking 2 columns).  When 0 (legacy), falls back to `text.chars().count()`.

members.name: ch
members.docs_md: The character under the cursor (for block-cursor rendering).

items.name: TermViewportPatch
items.docs_md:
Incremental viewport update. Contains only changed lines plus cursor/selection.
When `full` is true, `changed_lines` contains ALL lines (used on resize/spawn).

members.name: changed_lines
members.docs_md: (row_index, line) pairs for rows that changed since last sync.

members.name: full
members.docs_md: When true, changed_lines contains every row (full viewport rebuild).

items.name: cursor_row_update
items.signature: pub fn cursor_row_update(previous: Option<&TermCursor>, next: &TermCursor) -> CursorRowUpdate

members.name: pressed
members.docs_md: true for press, false for release

members.name: moving
members.docs_md: true when this is a motion event (drag if button<3, move if button==3)

items.name: ServerPlugin
items.docs_md:
Embeds each page manifest's static webview bundle into Bevy's asset registry so pages
can be served over `vmux://` URLs.

items.name: mark_webview_page_ready
items.signature: pub fn mark_webview_page_ready(trigger: bevy::prelude::On<'_, '_, bevy_cef::prelude::BinReceive<PageReady>>, commands: bevy::prelude::Commands<'_, '_>)

items.name: config_dir
items.docs_md:
User config directory: `~/.vmux`. Holds `settings.ron` (and per-build
overrides), separate from the profile-isolated [`shared_data_dir`].

items.name: settings_path_candidates
items.docs_md:
Settings files in priority order: the per-build override first (e.g.
`~/.vmux/dev/settings.ron`), then the shared `~/.vmux/settings.ron`.

items.name: settings_path
items.docs_md:
The settings file to read/write: the first candidate that exists, falling
back to the shared `~/.vmux/settings.ron` when none exist yet.

items.name: migrate_legacy_personal_layout
items.docs_md:
Relocate the default profile's layout to the profile-agnostic dirs and undo
#145's per-profile spaces nesting. Skipped for test sessions.

items.name: parse_page_agent_url
items.signature: pub fn parse_page_agent_url(url: &str) -> Option<(String, String, Option<String>)>

items.name: unpack_crx
items.signature: pub fn unpack_crx(bytes: &[u8], dest: &std::path::Path) -> Result<(), String>

items.name: prepare_unpacked
items.signature: pub fn prepare_unpacked(dir: &std::path::Path, key_b64: &str, popup: Option<&str>) -> Result<(), String>

items.name: update_index
items.signature: pub fn update_index(root: &std::path::Path, f: F) -> Result<(), String>

items.name: uninstall
items.signature: pub fn uninstall(root: &std::path::Path, id: &str) -> Result<(), String>

items.name: initials_of
items.docs_md: Up to two uppercase initials from a display name ("Junichi Sugiura" -> "JS").
